title: SPCA Mossel Bay’s Waffles is ‘sunshine on four legs’
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Waffles is a sweet...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Waffles is a sweet and mild-mannered young fox terrier cross who is waiting to be adopted from the Garden Route SPCA Mossel Bay branch by a loving family.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Waffles is a sweet and mild-mannered young fox terrier cross who is waiting to be adopted from the Garden Route SPCA Mossel Bay branch by a loving family."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A lover of hugs, pets and cuddles, Waffles has been described by the branch’s adoption manager, Kay Ievers, as ‘sunshine on four legs’."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“She is the friendliest little thing,” said Ievers. “She enjoys being around people and has an excellent appetite.”","html":"“She is the friendliest little thing,” said Ievers. “She enjoys being around people and has an excellent appetite.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you would like some sunshine in your life, call the Garden Route SPCA’s Mossel Bay branch on 044 693 0824 to adopt Waffles.","html":"If you would like some sunshine in your life, call the Garden Route SPCA’s Mossel Bay branch on 044 693 0824 to adopt Waffles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: SPCA Mossel Bay’s Waffles is ‘sunshine on four legs’
